checks.description: When din_valid is asserted for fewer than eight consecutive cycles, dout_valid must remain low and dout_parallel must not reflect a completed word.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid stays 0 and dout_parallel does not change to a new 8‑bit value until eight valid bits have been received.
checks.trigger_condition: din_valid deasserted before eight bits are collected.

checks.description: After eight consecutive cycles with din_valid asserted, dout_valid must become 1 and dout_parallel must contain the transmitted bits in MSB‑to‑LSB order.
checks.pass_condition: dout_valid transitions to 1 and dout_parallel reflects the eight collected din_serial bits, with the first received bit occupying bit 7 and the last occupying bit 0.
checks.trigger_condition: Eight consecutive din_valid cycles with din_serial driven.
